description: JSON schema for the updateDomain operation request payload

shortName.description: The domain's short name. Skip this if no update should be made.

fullName.description: The domain's full name. Skip this if no update should be made.

description.description: The domain's description. Skip this if no update should be made or provide as an empty string to remove the current value.

reportMetadata.description: The domain's additional metadata for XML reports.
